creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Apparently the Berkeley DB versions 4.1 and 4.8 are fine, so versions in 
between will likely work, too.

However, please review and add the missing patches - they might be 
security relevant or fix other bugs.  If they aren't needed, please 
respond here with reasons so that I can remove the FORBIDDEN= mark.

-- 
Matthias Andree
ports committer
